Notes/Restrictions

column3: $20 Added to your Free Agent Auction Budget (FAAB) balance
column5: Can be used anytime in-season. These dollars will follow normal 'reset' league settings once added to the owner's FAAB balance.

column3: Double your point total for one position for one week
column5: Must be declared to commish and opponent before 1st game of the week kickoff.  NOT ELIGIBLE for MAFFL Upper-Tier playoffs.

column3: Make a regular season swap of opponents.  A 1-for-1 swap of teams.
column5: Regular season only.  Division matchups are not eligible to be swapped.  Must be declared to commish and all parties involved before 1st game of the week kickoff.

column3: Make a pre-season swap of divisional alignment.  A 1-for-1 swap of teams.
column5: Must be declared in off-season prior to MAFFL draft, following division alignment on 8/1

column3: Guarantee your safety from relegation for the current season regardless of your final standing.
column5: Must be declared before Regular Season Week 4 (1st game of the week kickoff).   Ensures tiebreaker elevation to Seed #7 if owner is unlabe to make Playoffs
